name: Lbi Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 Orange bell pepper, cut into strips
Scallions, sliced (using only the white part)
Chicken breast meat, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Begin boiling a pot of water for the spaghetti.
2. Prepare and sprinkle pepper over the chicken and vegetables.
3. Mix together chicken broth, soy sauce, and Marsala wine. Season with pepper.
4. Heat a large skillet with olive oil spray. Cook vegetables over high heat for about 1 minute.
5. Add chicken to the skillet and stir-fry until no longer pink.
6. Pour in the sauce mixture and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and let it simmer uncovered.
8. Meanwhile, cook spaghetti in boiling water for 10 minutes or as per package directions.
9. Once the spaghetti is cooked, add flour and water to the chicken mixture in the skillet. Increase heat and continue cooking until the sauce thickens.
10. Serve the chicken over the spaghetti.
Source: Lisa Clarke
